title: Nutty Velvety Saudia Hazelnut Stir-fry
description: A midnight-craving saudi arabian dish featuring nuttiness and velvety texture with hazelnuts, orange zest, and a touch of pescatarian-friendly ingredients to satisfy your cravings.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Toast hazelnuts until golden and fragrant.
Crack eggs into the hot pan, stirring gently as they cook, forming an egg base for your dish.
Add toasted hazelnuts to the pan, mixing them well with the eggs.
Next, finely chop ginger and mix it in the pan. Add saffron threads and a generous amount of orange zest. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed and heated through.
Fold in peanuts and turmeric powder for additional flavor.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
